steps.t: Shimmering river-toads can be found along the shores of various streams and ponds in North Ithilien, especially to the north-east of Henneth Annûn. Rh…
Rhadrog can be found in Henneth Annûn. You have carefully gathered a great deal of toad-slime and should now return to Rhadrog.
Workbenches can be found within the deepest caverns of Henneth Annûn. You have gathered phials of toad-slime and should now use it to coat arrow-heads…
Rhadrog can be found in Henneth Annûn. You have coated many arrow-heads in toad-slime and should now report back to Rhadrog.
